name: cordyceps militaris
summary: cordyceps militaris is tracked for Increases ATP production and oxygen utilization with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
description: cordyceps militaris is tracked for Increases ATP production and oxygen utilization with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
safetyNotes: An eight-week fermented-beverage trial in healthy adults found no between-group differences in blood sugar, lipids, liver, kidney, or blood safety indices; a six-week adjunctive trial with duloxetine found no adverse-event incidence difference from placebo. These small, product-specific studies do not establish long-term, pregnancy, breastfeeding, autoimmune, transplant, or broader interaction safety.
